positive: A stunning, highly detailed retro-futuristic celestial botanical print. Central composition features intertwined silhouettes of glowing crescent moons, stylized constellations (like Ursa Major and Orion), and exotic bioluminescent flora (giant ferns, crystalline blooms). The style should mimic vintage screen printing and linocut woodblock art, utilizing a restricted, harmonious color palette of deep midnight blue, emerald green, gold leaf accents, and bone white. Strong contrast and clean, defined linework are essential for apparel printing. The composition must be balanced, suitable for a repeat or large central graphic.
